final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: illustration-concept
Asset type: technical illustration, square crop
Primary request: intricate steampunk mechanical device with complex gears, pipes and gauges
Scene/backdrop: Victorian-era workshop environment, brass fittings and copper tubing
Subject: elaborate mechanical apparatus featuring interlocking brass gears, copper pipes, pressure gauges with ornate dials, steam valves and riveted metal plates
Style/medium: detailed technical illustration with Victorian decorative elements, steampunk aesthetic
Composition/framing: medium shot showing the full assembly, slight angle to reveal depth and complexity
Lighting/mood: warm ambient workshop lighting with brass reflections, nostalgic and industrial atmosphere
Color palette: warm brass gold + copper orange + aged bronze + dark iron + sepia undertones
Materials/textures: polished brass with patina, hammered copper, cast iron, leather gaskets, riveted seams
Constraints: maintain Victorian-era decorative flourishes and precision engineering details
Avoid: clean modern plastic, minimalist design, cold sterile lighting, digital glow effects
